fullOutput:
<path>/home/user/code/pkgs/id/justfile</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: # Justfile for the id project.
2: #
3: # Just is a command runner (like make but simpler).
4: # Install: cargo install just
5: # Usage: just <recipe>
6: #
7: # Run `just` with no arguments to see available recipes.
8: #
9: # NOTE: Commands marked [bun] need Bun installed (use `nix develop`).
10: # NOTE: Every just command should have a corresponding `nix run .#<cmd>` in flake.nix.
11: #
12: # Naming conventions:
13: #   - Simple command names (build, serve, check) default to web variant
14: #   - Use -lib suffix for library-only variant (no web/bun required)
15: #   - Use -force suffix to bypass freshness checks
16: 
17: # Default recipe - serve with web UI
18: default: kill-serve
19: 
20: # =============================================================================
21: # Quality Checks
22: # =============================================================================
23: 
24: # Run all checks (with auto-fix first) [bun]
25: check: fix ci
26:     @echo "✓ All checks passed!"
27: 
28: # CI-safe checks (read-only, no modifications) [bun]
29: ci: fmt-check cargo-check lint test test-web-unit test-web-typecheck doc
30:     @echo "✓ CI checks passed!"
31: 
32: # Auto-fix formatting and lint issues
33: fix: fmt lint-fix
34:     @echo "✓ Fixed what could be fixed"
35: 
36: # Format Rust code
37: fmt:
38:     cargo fmt
39: 
40: # Check Rust formatting (no changes)
41: fmt-check:
42:     cargo fmt -- --check
43: 
44: # Run cargo check (type checking, all targets and features)
45: cargo-check:
46:     cargo check --all-targets --all-features
47: 
48: # Run clippy linting
49: lint:
50:     cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features
51: 
52: # Run clippy with auto-fix
53: lint-fix:
54:     cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features --fix --allow-dirty --allow-staged
55: 
56: # Run all Rust tests
57: test:
58:     cargo test --all-features
59: 
60: # Run unit tests only (fast)
61: test-unit:
62:     cargo test --all-features --lib
63: 
64: # Run integration tests only
65: test-int:
66:     cargo test --all-features --test cli_integration
67: 
68: # Run tests with output shown
69: test-verbose:
70:     cargo test --all-features -- --nocapture
71: 
72: # Run a specific test by name
73: test-one NAME:
74:     cargo test --all-features {{NAME}}
75: 
76: # [bun] Run web tests (Rust + TypeScript unit tests + type checking)
77: test-web: test test-web-unit test-web-typecheck
78:     @echo "✓ All web tests passed!"
79: 
80: # [bun] Run TypeScript unit tests only
81: test-web-unit:
82:     cd web && bun test
83: 
84: # [bun] Run TypeScript type checking only
85: test-web-typecheck:
86:     cd web && bun run typecheck
87: 
88: # Build Rust documentation
89: doc:
90:     cargo doc --no-deps --document-private-items
91: 
92: # Build and open documentation
93: doc-open:
94:     cargo doc --no-deps --document-private-items --open
95: 
96: # Generate code coverage report
97: coverage:
98:     cargo llvm-cov --html
99: 
100: # Generate and open coverage report
101: coverage-open:
102:     cargo llvm-cov --html --open
103: 
104: # Generate coverage summary
105: coverage-summary:
106:     cargo llvm-cov
107: 
108: # =============================================================================
109: # Build Commands
110: # =============================================================================
111: 
112: # Build with web UI (default) [bun]
113: build:
114:     ./scripts/build.sh web debug
115: 
116: # Build library only (no web/bun required)
117: build-lib:
118:     ./scripts/build.sh lib debug
119: 
120: # Build release with web UI [bun]
121: release:
122:     ./scripts/build.sh web release
123: 
124: # Build release library only
125: release-lib:
126:     ./scripts/build.sh lib release
127: 
128: # Force rebuild with web UI (skip freshness checks) [bun]
129: build-force: build-web-force
130: build-web-force: web build-web-cargo mark-variant-web
131: 
132: # Force rebuild library only
133: build-lib-force: build-lib-cargo mark-variant-lib
134: 
135: # Force rebuild release with web UI [bun]
136: release-force: release-web-force
137: 
138: release-web-force: web release-web-cargo mark-variant-release-web
139: 
140: # Force rebuild release library only
141: release-lib-force: release-lib-cargo mark-variant-release-lib
142: 
143: # cargo build commands
144: build-cargo: build-web-cargo
145: 
146: build-web-cargo:
147:     cargo build --features web
148: 
149: build-lib-cargo:
150:     cargo build
151: 
152: release-web-cargo:
153:     cargo build --release --features web
154: 
155: release-lib-cargo:
156:     cargo build --release
157: 
158: # Internal: variant tracking
159: [private]
160: mark-variant-web:
161:     @mkdir -p target && echo "web" > target/.build-variant
162: 
163: [private]
164: mark-variant-lib:
165:     @mkdir -p target && echo "lib" > target/.build-variant
166: 
167: [private]
168: mark-variant-release-web:
169:     @mkdir -p target && echo "web" > target/.build-variant-release
170: 
171: [private]
172: mark-variant-release-lib:
173:     @mkdir -p target && echo "lib" > target/.build-variant-release
174: 
175: # Clean all build artifacts
176: clean:
177:     cargo clean
178: 
179: # =============================================================================
180: # Web Assets [bun]
181: # =============================================================================
182: 
183: # [bun] Build web frontend assets
184: web: web-assets
185: assets: web-assets
186: 
187: web-assets:
188:     ./scripts/build.sh assets
189: 
190: # [bun] Force rebuild web assets
191: web-force: web-assets-force
192: 
193: web-assets-force:
194:     cd web && bun install && bun run build
195: 
196: # [bun] Watch web assets for development
197: web-dev: web-assets-dev
198: 
199: web-assets-dev:
200:     cd web && bun install && bun run dev
201: 
202: # =============================================================================
203: # Run Commands
204: # =============================================================================
205: 
206: # Run CLI with arguments (lib variant)
207: run *ARGS:
208:     RUST_LOG="${RUST_LOG:-debug}" cargo run -- {{ARGS}}
209: 
210: # Serve with web UI (default) [bun]
211: serve *ARGS: web (serve-web ARGS)
212: 
213: # Serve with web UI (no asset build) [bun]
214: serve-web *ARGS:
215:     RUST_LOG="${RUST_LOG:-debug}" cargo run --features web -- serve --web {{ARGS}}
216: 
217: # Serve without web UI
218: serve-lib *ARGS:
219:     RUST_LOG="${RUST_LOG:-debug}" cargo run -- serve {{ARGS}}
220: 
221: # Build and serve with web UI (alias for serve) [bun]
222: build-serve *ARGS: build (serve ARGS)
223: 
224: # Kill any running 'id serve' processes
225: kill:
226:     -pkill -xf ".*/id serve.*"
227: 
228: # Sleep for specified seconds (default 0.6)
229: sleep SECONDS="0.6":
230:     sleep {{SECONDS}}
231: 
232: # Kill and restart serve with web UI [bun]
233: kill-serve *ARGS: kill sleep (serve ARGS)
234: 
235: # Run the REPL
236: repl:
237:     RUST_LOG="${RUST_LOG:-debug}" cargo run -- repl
238: 
239: # =============================================================================
240: # Watch Commands
241: # =============================================================================
242: 
243: # Watch and run tests on changes
244: watch-test:
245:     cargo watch -x test
246: 
247: # Watch and run clippy on changes
248: watch-lint:
249:     cargo watch -x clippy
250: 
251: # Watch and rebuild on changes
252: watch:
253:     cargo watch -x build
254: 
255: # =============================================================================
256: # Dependency Management
257: # =============================================================================
258: 
259: # Check for outdated dependencies
260: outdated:
261:     cargo outdated
262: 
263: # Audit dependencies for security vulnerabilities
264: audit:
265:     cargo audit
266: 
267: # Find unused dependencies
268: machete:
269:     cargo machete
270: 
271: # Update Cargo.lock
272: update:
273:     cargo update
274: 
275: # Show dependency tree
276: tree:
277:     cargo tree
278: 
279: # =============================================================================
280: # Utilities
281: # =============================================================================
282: 
283: # Count lines of code
284: loc:
285:     tokei
286: 
287: # =============================================================================
288: # Combined Commands
289: # =============================================================================
290: 
291: # Build and check [bun]
292: build-check: build check
293: 
294: # Build, check, and serve with web UI [bun]
295: build-check-serve *ARGS: build check (serve ARGS)
296: 
297: # Build, check, and serve without web UI
298: build-check-serve-lib: build-lib ci serve-lib
299: 
300: # Build and serve without web UI
301: build-serve-lib: build-lib serve-lib
302: 
303: # =============================================================================
304: # Legacy Aliases (for backwards compatibility)
305: # =============================================================================
306: 
307: # Alias: test-lib -> test-unit
308: test-lib: test-unit
309: 
310: # Alias: build-release -> release
311: build-release: release
312: 
313: # Alias: build-lib-release -> release-lib
314: build-lib-release: release-lib
315: 
316: # Alias: build-web -> build
317: build-web: build
318: 
319: # Alias: build-web-release -> release
320: build-web-release: release
321: 
322: # Alias: web-build -> web
323: web-build: web
324: 
325: # Alias: web-typecheck -> test-web
326: web-typecheck: test-web
327: 
328: # Alias: watch-build -> watch
329: watch-build: watch
330: 
331: # Alias: check-all -> check (with fix)
332: check-all: check

(End of file - total 332 lines)
</content>
